docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOLYNEC, TATJANA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2022 - CONTINUED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO DEC-19-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TATJANA VOLYNEC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM (UNAUTHORIZED), ORALLY AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AND REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA KNIGHT, CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT NO LONGER CHALLENGING VENUE AND COURT FINDS VENUE TO BE PROPER. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST, REQUEST NEEDS TO BE RECEIVED AT THE COURTHOUSE AT LEAST 10 DAYS PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE. COURT FINDS THERE IS A NEED FOR PLAINTIFF TO BE ASSISTED BY A RUSSIAN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUED TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TATJANA VOLYNEC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AUG-18-2022 IS INVALID. PROOF OF SERVICE SHOULD BE SERVED TO AGENT LISTED ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHRISTINA KNIGHT, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLYNEC, TATJANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00, $250 AND COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOLYNEC, TATJANA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY VOLYNEC, TATJANA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOLYNEC, TATJANA AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED TO PRINCESS CRUISES-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT OF SERVICE: CT CORP] SERVED OCT-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF TATJANA VOLYNEC IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER YANINA GOTSULSKY #301208. DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINA KNIGHT, CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT PRINCESS CRUISES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
